description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows Build and Test that runs on push to main and tags starting with v*, and on pull requests to any branch. The workflow has two jobs, Windows-mavsdk_server and Windows-mavsdk-library, both running on windows-latest. Each job checks out the repository, fetches version tags, and uses caching for third-party dependencies. They install jom, configure and build using cmake, and upload artifacts to GitHub Releases.
